title: Vue 2 viewer App.vue fails to compile — TypeScript generics not supported by @vitejs/plugin-vue2
description: The Vue 2 viewer (vue/2/viewer) uses @vitejs/plugin-vue2 which does not support TypeScript generics in <script lang="ts"> blocks without an additional babel TypeScript preset. The error is: 'Unexpected token, expected ","' at invoke<string>(...) in App.vue line 148. The App.vue was written against Vue 3 conventions and never worked with the Vue 2 plugin. Fix: add @vitejs/plugin-vue2-script-setup and babel-preset-typescript to vite.config, or replace TypeScript generics in App.vue with plain JS type assertions. SafeTabs.vue for Vue 2 is correctly written and not the source of this error.
acceptance: Vue 2 viewer starts without compile errors
All component samples load in vue/2 viewer
